items.name_en: 👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
items.name_cn:
👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
🌟Beechwood handle + unique silhouette = unforgettable
🌟Cotton-linen fabric and leather patchwork + yellow calfskin lining = exquisite from the inside out.
🌟Perfect strap length, only 250g! Light enough to make you doubt if it's a bag. This is the unique charm of MiniSaigon.
🌟Suitable for any style and occasion, no need to worry about matching. Absolutely stunning.
🌟All the beautiful colors are shared here. A safe bet, no wrong choices.
 Dimensions 21*14.5*9.5CM
Model 8005

items.name_en: Goyard Jet Black Limited Edition Saint Louis Small Shopping Bag, made of new Goyardine space black canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, reversible, front is Goyardine canvas, other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles taper from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hanging on one handle for quick access.

items.name_cn:
Goyard Bohème Hobo~
Goyard HOBO is the ultimate in relaxed style! A minimalist, casual bag perfect for daily commuting. Lightweight and soft, it offers surprisingly spacious capacity to hold all your essentials. Features an extended comfortable leather handle and a shoulder strap long enough for an underarm carry. Includes a detachable pouch—truly a dream bag.
Size:32 cm x 13.5 cm x 34 cm
🔍03687655
..
